title: Complaint data model
description: Schema to capture passenger complaints and service requests.

subtasks.title: Define Complaint schema
subtasks.description: Define Complaint schema with fields (userId, category, description, relatedBusId, relatedRouteId, status, resolutionNote, createdAt).

subtasks.title: Implement Mongoose model
subtasks.description: Implement Mongoose model and export it from models/Complaint.js.

subtasks.title: Configure database indexes
subtasks.description: Configure database indexes on query-intensive fields like userId, status, and createdAt.
